tidecaller_signet.name: Tidecaller's Signet
tidecaller_signet.description: A silver ring set with a bead of never-drying seawater. Worn, the deep parts around you — you swim like an otter and hold your breath far longer.

ring_strength.name: Ring of Strength
ring_strength.description: A heavy iron band engraved with runes of might.

ring_protection.name: Ring of Protection
ring_protection.description: A silver band that wards off harm.

ring_intellect.name: Ring of Intellect
ring_intellect.description: A copper ring inset with a sapphire.

ring_health.name: Ring of Vitality
ring_health.description: A jade ring that pulses with warmth.

amulet_health.name: Amulet of Health
amulet_health.description: A warm amulet of polished bone.

amulet_mana.name: Amulet of Mana
amulet_mana.description: A crystal amulet that hums faintly.

amulet_warding.name: Amulet of Warding
amulet_warding.description: An iron pendant on a leather cord.

swift_boots.name: Boots of Swiftness
swift_boots.description: Boots that move almost of their own accord.

silent_boots.name: Boots of Silence
silent_boots.description: Boots that make no sound when worn.

crown_of_bloodstone.name: Crown of Bloodstone
crown_of_bloodstone.description: The blood-red circlet of the kings of Bloodstone, cold and heavy with old authority.

teleport_ring.name: Wayfarer's Ring
teleport_ring.description: A plain brass band of the Wayfarers' Conclave — attune to a rune-circle platform and it carries you between the towns.

amulet_of_warding.name: Amulet of Warding
amulet_of_warding.description: A rune-etched amulet that turns aside harm.

mage_ring.name: Ring of the Magi
mage_ring.description: A silver band humming with arcane power.

ring_of_spell_storing.name: Ring of Spell Storing
ring_of_spell_storing.description: A ring that holds a caged spell, loosed at a thought. 6 charges.

ring_of_regeneration.name: Ring of Regeneration
ring_of_regeneration.description: Wounds close on their own while it is worn.

ring_of_the_archmage.name: Ring of the Archmage
ring_of_the_archmage.description: A ring of the great mages — it swells your power and stores a bolt of lightning.

ring_of_fire_resistance.name: Ring of Fire Resistance
ring_of_fire_resistance.description: A ruby ring that turns flame to a warm caress.

amulet_of_health.name: Amulet of Health
amulet_of_health.description: A jade amulet that fortifies the body.

amulet_of_the_planes.name: Amulet of the Planes
amulet_of_the_planes.description: A shifting amulet said to fold the very roads of the world.

circlet_of_intellect.name: Circlet of Intellect
circlet_of_intellect.description: A silver circlet that sharpens the mind to a razor.

boots_of_speed.name: Boots of Speed
boots_of_speed.description: Winged boots that blur the wearer into a haste. 3 charges.

boots_of_striding.name: Boots of Striding
boots_of_striding.description: Sturdy boots that make hard country easy going.

amulet_of_mana.name: Amulet of the Deep Well
amulet_of_mana.description: A sapphire amulet brimming with a bottomless well of magic.

ring_of_the_ram.name: Ring of the Ram
ring_of_the_ram.description: A ring that punches a battering blow of force.

cloak_of_elvenkind.name: Cloak of Elvenkind
cloak_of_elvenkind.description: A grey-green cloak that blurs its wearer into the shadows.
